summary: Completed comprehensive testing of X-CLEAN iteration 7 features: NotificationBell component for low stock alerts, SMS sending (Twilio - MOCKED/returns 503), Email sending (Resend - MOCKED/returns 503), and PDF export buttons on DayManagement and Workers Statistics tabs. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Bell icon visible in header with red badge showing count, dropdown shows product name/location/quantities for low stock items. PDF and email buttons visible and correctly positioned.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/notifications/low-stock - returns 200 with auth
Backend: GET /api/notifications/low-stock - returns array of low stock items
Backend: GET /api/notifications/low-stock - items have required fields (inventory_id, product_name, current_quantity, min_level, location, severity)
Backend: GET /api/notifications/low-stock - shows Kerámia bevonat Budapest (1/5) and Debrecen (3/5) below min_level
Backend: GET /api/notifications/low-stock - requires authentication (401 without session)
Backend: POST /api/send-sms - returns 503 with message 'SMS szolgáltatás nincs konfigurálva...' (MOCKED - no Twilio keys)
Backend: POST /api/send-sms - requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/send-email - returns 503 with message 'Email szolgáltatás nincs konfigurálva...' (MOCKED - no Resend key)
Backend: POST /api/send-email - requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/notify-customer - returns 503 without Twilio config
Backend: POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/notify-customer - returns 404 for invalid job_id
Backend: POST /api/jobs/{job_id}/notify-customer - requires authentication
Backend: Inventory has items below min_level for notification testing
Frontend Header: NotificationBell component (data-testid='notification-bell') visible
Frontend Header: Bell icon shows red badge with count '2'
Frontend Header: Clicking bell opens dropdown (data-testid='notification-dropdown')
Frontend Notification Dropdown: Shows 'Készlet figyelmeztetések (2)' header
Frontend Notification Dropdown: Lists Kerámia bevonat @ Budapest with 1/5 quantity
Frontend Notification Dropdown: Lists Kerámia bevonat @ Debrecen with 3/5 quantity
Frontend DayManagement: Page loads with data-testid='day-management-page'
Frontend DayManagement: 'PDF letöltés' button visible (data-testid='download-day-pdf-btn')
Frontend DayManagement: 'Küldés emailben' button visible (data-testid='email-day-pdf-btn')
Frontend DayManagement: Export buttons container visible (data-testid='day-export-buttons')
Frontend DayManagement: KPI cards visible (Mai autók, Mai bevétel, Készpénz, Kártya)
Frontend Workers: Page loads with data-testid='workers-page'
Frontend Workers: Statisztika tab visible and clickable
Frontend Workers Stats: 'PDF letöltés' button visible (data-testid='download-worker-pdf-btn')
Frontend Workers Stats: 'Küldés emailben' button visible (data-testid='email-worker-pdf-btn')
Frontend Workers Stats: Summary cards visible (total-days-worked, total-hours-worked, total-cars-completed)
Frontend Workers Stats: 'Dolgozói havi összesítő' table title visible
Frontend Workers Stats: Table columns (Dolgozó, Telephely, Napok, Órák, Autók, Bevétel) visible
Frontend Workers Stats: 5 worker stat rows visible with data-testid='worker-stat-row-{id}'

mocked_integrations.SMS_Twilio: POST /api/send-sms - Returns 503 with message about missing TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_PHONE_NUMBER in .env
mocked_integrations.Email_Resend: POST /api/send-email - Returns 503 with message about missing RESEND_API_KEY in .env

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 added: 1) NotificationBell component in header showing low stock items with red badge count. 2) PDF export buttons on DayManagement and Workers Statistics tabs using jsPDF client-side generation. 3) SMS and Email endpoints that gracefully return 503 when Twilio/Resend are not configured. Low stock notifications work based on inventory items where current_quantity < min_level. Kerámia bevonat has been set below min_level at both Budapest and Debrecen locations.
